name: podlearn
description: Research, transcribe, search, and learn from podcasts and YouTube videos. Bundles the PodLearn MCP server plus a skill that routes intent through its tools (search, transcribe a URL or a whole feed, pull cited transcripts, generate lessons).

mcpToken.title: PodLearn MCP token
mcpToken.description: Your personal PodLearn token (starts with pl_mcp_). Generate it at https://podlearn.ai/settings.
